rationale: The main alert (A0) shows PowerShell downloading a file from a suspicious shortened URL ('http://bit.ly/L3g1tCrad1e') using Net.WebClient, with the window style hidden. Evidence EV-003 confirms the successful creation of the downloaded file 'Default_File_Path.ps1' in the Administrator's directory. This behavior is indicative of a drive-by download or initial access attempt.
